title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 80 Prospect Street in Avon, New York, as the "Officer Anthony Mazurkiewicz Memorial Post Office Building".
stage_label: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
crs_summary: This bill designates the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 80 Prospect Street in Avon, New York, as the "Officer Anthony Mazurkiewicz Memorial Post Office Building".
last_action_text: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs.
